name: Coverage: Register then login E2E smoke
description: New user registers with a unique email, lands on dashboard or login, then can access the calendar area.

planSteps.description: Wait 2 seconds for the register form
Verify Create account or registration form fields for name/email/password are visible
Type TestSprite User into the name field if present
Type a unique email using pattern ts.e2e.<current-timestamp>@example.com into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field and confirm-password field if present
Click Create account or Register submit
Wait up to 10 seconds for success redirect to dashboard or login
Verify either the weekly calendar dashboard loaded, or a success message, or the login page is ready after registration
If still on login, sign in with the same unique email and TimeoraDemo123! and wait for dashboard
Verify authenticated UI is reachable: weekly calendar, + Add Event, or Open AI chat control
